GOTIFY_DEFAULTUSER_NAME.description: Default admin username for the Gotify web UI.

GOTIFY_DEFAULTUSER_PASS.description: Default admin password. Auto-generated on first deploy — change after setup.

GOTIFY_DATABASE_DIALECT.description: Database engine: sqlite3, mysql, or postgres. SQLite is built-in and automatic.

GOTIFY_DATABASE_CONNECTION.description: Database connection string. For SQLite: data/gotify.db. For Postgres: ${{Postgres.DATABASE_URL}}

GOTIFY_REGISTRATION.description: Allow public user registration (true/false). Default is false — disable to prevent open signups.
